description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.5, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, pypy3). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip and poetry, configure a Git user, run the test suite with pytest, verify the package format with twine, and upload the coverage results to Coveralls.
